essence: Leads production operations, balancing capacity, quality, and cost to meet business objectives.

identity.title: Manufacturing Operations Manager
identity.summary: Oversees production teams, implements continuous improvement, manages KPIs, and ensures safe, efficient operations.

salary.notes: Large site managers or those in high‑value sectors command higher packages.

qualifications: Experience managing production teams and operations
Knowledge of lean manufacturing and continuous improvement
Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills
Familiarity with safety and regulatory compliance

lifestyle.description: Management role with responsibility for shifts, targets, and continuous improvement; frequent cross‑functional coordination.

habits: Monitors production KPIs and drives improvements
Leads daily operations meetings and shift handovers
